items.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 22)
items.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

items.title: Why the Supreme Court struck down Trump's most sweeping tariffs
items.description: The Supreme Court divided 6-3 in finding that a federal law known as IEEPA does not authorize the president to impose tariffs.
